title: phaius occidentalis
intro: Phaius occidentalis is a type of terrestrial orchid, commonly known as the western spotted phaius, that is native to the western parts of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phaius occidentalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
